rationale.R1.6: The rewritten text is polished and free of errors, with consistent register and no lost meaning.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flagged uncertainty for all claims, marking confidence and missing evidence.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d), with no scope drift.
rationale.RX.4: The original text introduces new errors (inconsistent arithmetic) and fabrications (unsupported generalization).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, including corrections to hedging and inconsistencies.
